monitor.capture_what: files created or modified that contain cleartext sensitive data patterns (SSN formats like XXX-XX-XXXX or credit card number sequences) written via target.write_text()

oracle_check.condition_description: Any file written to disk during the function execution contains unencrypted sensitive data matching SSN pattern (\d{3}-\d{2}-\d{4}) or credit card number pattern (13-19 consecutive digits) in its file contents
oracle_check.raise_message_template: PY_CLEAR-TEXT-STORAGE-SENSITIVE-DATA: cleartext sensitive data written to filesystem — captured={captured} pattern={matched_pattern}
